overall.description: First-person perspective from a seated passenger inside a futuristic cyberpunk train traveling through Night City from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The interior features distinctive neon green lighting and metallic surfaces while the train alternates between dark tunnels and elevated sections with city views visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic subway train interior traveling through underground tunnel

events.description: digital advertisement appears on tunnel wall visible through window

agents.ego_description: sitting stationary on the train seat observing the interior and tunnel passing by

notable_agents.action: male passenger in green pants sitting and looking at a handheld device
passenger with blonde hair standing and holding the support pole

entered.detail: metallic support poles with glowing green neon accents running vertically through the train car
dark upholstered bench seats along the sides of the train car
illuminated display showing route information and advertisements hanging from ceiling
large rectangular windows showing the passing tunnel walls
dark concrete tunnel walls with occasional lighting fixtures passing by

segments.scene_description: The segment shows the interior of a futuristic train car with neon green lighting accents. The camera is seated and stationary, showing other passengers sitting and standing. The train moves through a dark underground tunnel with occasional digital advertisements visible on the tunnel walls through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train section passing through urban cityscape

events.description: train exits tunnel and emerges into elevated section with city buildings visible outside
exterior lighting brightens as train passes through densely built-up area with neon signs

agents.ego_description: continues sitting and observing the cityscape now visible through the windows

notable_agents.action: female passenger in foreground sitting and holding a drink container

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers and urban structures visible through the train windows
metal support beams and track infrastructure visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the tunnel into an elevated section of the city, revealing Night City's skyline through the windows. The interior lighting mixes with the external neon glow from buildings. Passengers remain seated as the train travels above street level past glass and steel skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to underground tunnel with digital advertising displays

events.description: train re-enters tunnel, city view disappears and tunnel walls return

agents.ego_description: sitting and watching the digital advertisements scroll by on the tunnel walls

entered.detail: dark tunnel walls with illuminated digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The train returns to the underground tunnel system. The windows now show passing digital billboards and advertisements on the tunnel walls rather than the cityscape. The interior remains consistently lit with green neon accents as the journey continues through the enclosed corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a train seat as the environment shifts from a dark subterranean tunnel to a bright urban skyline and back again. It begins inside a futuristic car illuminated by neon green accents, where the windows reveal a dark underground passage punctuated by flickering digital advertisements. As the train emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens up to an elevated section of Night City, blending the interior green glow with the external neon lights of towering glass and steel skyscrapers. The view then shifts back into the enclosed corridor as the train descends, replacing the cityscape with a sequence of passing billboards on the tunnel walls. The journey concludes with the camera remaining stationary among the passengers while the train glides through the dark, neon-lit underground.
